message:
fix: Make ThreadDO self-contained with own python.wasm + stdlib imports

ThreadDO.execute() previously expected wasmModule and createWasi to be
passed via DO RPC, but WebAssembly.Module and closures aren't
serializable across DO boundaries. Now ThreadDO imports python.wasm and
stdlib-fs directly (same pattern as PythonDO), making thread_spawn
actually callable at runtime.

Also adds missing dl_open/dl_sym/dl_close/dl_error stubs to ThreadDO's
minimal pymode imports and uses ProcExit for clean exit handling.
